items.name_en: 【Camera Box Handbag】 m82465
items.name_cn:
【Camera Box Handbag】 m82465
This Camera Box handbag features a modern structure crafted from Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, blending signature details of the Petite Malle such as the S-lock closure, metal corners, and studs. A slender chain adds a feminine touch, while the top handle offers another comfortable carrying option.
Size: 12.5 x 17.6 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
The CarryAll HlJH small handbag features Monogram Hl LT canvas and leather trim, creating a perfect companion for urban life. The spacious design includes a neat interior with a large inner pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
Size: 29 x 24 x 12 cm

items.name_en: 【Celebrity Favorite】🔥Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse New Clutch 👜The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design 💄with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile😍Can be carried as a handbag🧸or worn on the shoulder with a donut ⛓chain or crossbody with a leather strap. 👛This version is made of soft Nappa sheepskin.*Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap*Detachable donut chain adorned with Anagram Engraved Pebble texture*Subtle magnetic closure*Suede lining* 🫶🏼LOE💋WE Gold or Silver Plating🧡
Dimensions: 30cm~20cm~10.5cm
Color: Desert Yellow

items.name_cn:
【cléa 】 m82383 ( )
Made of monogram canvas with a colorful leather lining, the "portefeuil lisa". A compact wallet with a coin pocket featuring a leather pull tab and a card slot. The size is also attractive for small bags and clutches. Inside features a bill compartment, 2 flat pockets, and 4 card slots.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5cm

items.name_en: 【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
items.name_cn:
【Coin Purse】 m12217 Monogram Red m12229 Monogram Blue (Print-Santa Collection)
This coin purse belongs to the Candy Factory collection, dressing the brand mascot Vivienne in festive attire and paying tribute to the colorful holiday season with delicious seasonal candies, making it a perfect collector's gift. The monogram canvas creates a compact shape, while eye-catching metal details like the key ring and Vivienne-shaped zipper complete the look.
Size: 7 x 1.5 x 12 cm

items.name_en: 【Denim Blue Tiger ❤ Large】
items.name_cn:
【Denim Blue Tiger ❤ Large】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by the Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product that embodies Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm

Dior Mini Book tote
